zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Kyme於1225年出生在英國林可爾史爾素斯 吉時，他的父親Philip ofSotby de Kyme45歲，母親Agnes FitzAlan39歲。他和Lucy de Ros至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1259年9月3日之前在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾諾斯 吉，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾諾斯 吉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kyme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North or South Kyme (Lincs).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Kyme was born in 1225, in South Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Philip ofSotby de Kyme, was 45 and his mother, Agnes FitzAlan, was 39. He had at least 1 son with Lucy de Ros. He died before about 3 September 1259, in North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Kyme est né en 1225, à South Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip ofSotby de Kyme, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Agnes FitzAlan, avait 39 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Lucy de Ros. Il est décédé avant environ 3 septembre 1259, à North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Lucy de Ros. ja.lifeSummary: William de Kymeが1225年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアソウス クイメで生まれた時，父Philip ofSotby de Kymeは45歳，母Agnes FitzAlanは39歳であった。彼はLucy de Rosとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1259年9月3日以前にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノース クイメで死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノース クイメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Kyme(이)가 1225년 영국 링코실르 소우스 키에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip ofSotby de Kyme(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes FitzAlan(은)는 39세였다. 그는 Lucy de Ros(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1259년 9월 3일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 노르스 키에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 노르스 키에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Lucy de Ros. ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Kyme родился в 1225 г. в местности соут ким, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Philip ofSotby de Kyme было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes FitzAlan, 39. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Lucy de Ros. Он умер перед около 3 сентябрь 1259 г. в местности норт ким, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности норт ким, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
